consumer_hint: Node v168 production environment preflight checklist
scope: artifact digest compatibility matrix for binary, WAL, Snapshot, fixture, and release evidence before production preflight

release_inputs.boundary: target release and digest mapping are review evidence only and do not switch traffic or execute restore

compatibility_checks.expected: runtime version 0.68.0 must match release tag and binary digest evidence
compatibility_checks.boundary: version match is evidence only and does not approve production rollback

compatibility_checks.expected: WAL checksum evidence is reviewed before any restore window
compatibility_checks.boundary: WAL compatibility cannot repair Java transaction state

compatibility_checks.expected: Snapshot digest evidence is reviewed before any manual LOAD
compatibility_checks.boundary: Snapshot LOAD is not executed by this matrix

compatibility_checks.expected: fixture digest evidence is reviewed without writing a token
compatibility_checks.boundary: SETNXEX is inspected only through CHECKJSON and cannot create Java order authority

expected: CHECKJSON LOAD reports store_replace_from_snapshot without executing LOAD
CHECKJSON COMPACT reports wal_rewrite_when_enabled without executing COMPACT
CHECKJSON SETNXEX reports write risks without token claim

boundaries: does not run Java or Node
not connected to Java transaction chain
mini-kv remains not Java order authority

warnings: Node v168 may consume this matrix only after Java v59 and mini-kv v68 are complete
digest placeholders must be verified outside mini-kv before production use
artifact digest compatibility matrix is not a restore executor
pause_conditions: needs Node to auto-start Java or mini-kv
needs mini-kv in Java transaction consistency chain
binary/WAL/Snapshot/fixture digest is unclear or mismatched
